scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: 10 read streams (organizations, groups, campaigns, bitlinks, channels, webhooks, qr_codes, bsds, group_tags, plus the 4 wave1-pilot streams retained) and 15 write actions covering bitlink/campaign/group/channel/webhook/custom-bitlink/qr-code/tag lifecycle mutations. Excluded: the ~30-endpoint click/engagement/scan analytics-breakdown matrix (countries/cities/devices/referrers/referring_domains/referring_networks/engagements/shorten_counts/feature_usage/historical_usage/top/over_time cuts at both bitlink and group level, custom-bitlink click breakdowns, group-sorted bitlinks-by-engagement) as out_of_scope breadth-vs-cost triage for this probe run, single-object detail endpoints that duplicate an already-covered list stream's record shape, org-tier admin (plan_limits, shorten_counts aggregates), and non-data/destructive endpoints (user profile, OAuth app deauthorization, bulk export jobs).

excluded.reason: single-organization detail; identical record shape to the organizations list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
